cards.name: 9 of Cups
cards.interpretation: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure

cards.name: ⅩⅣ Temperance, reversed

cards.name: 5 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: end of conflict, cooperation, agreements, truces, harmony, peace, avoiding conflict
